name: Literature Sentinel
purpose: Scan PubMed/PMC watchlist for new studies, reviews, corrections, retractions.

name: Safety Signal Sentinel
purpose: Check openFDA/FAERS as signal-only review triggers.

name: Protocol Diff
purpose: Compare current protocols/rules to updated evidence and manifests.

name: Citation Auditor
purpose: Verify every citation supports the exact claim and directness label.

name: Evidence Grader
purpose: Assign evidence levels and prevent overstatement.

name: Safety Gate Auditor
purpose: Identify new red flags, hard stops, or review gates.

name: Validation Test Agent
purpose: Create regression tests for every proposed clinical change.

name: Version Publisher
purpose: After signoff only, publish manifest, changelog, rollback info.
